skills.name: cal-ood
skills.description: Object-Oriented Data principles, violation patterns, and compliance test. Use when reviewing code for OOD compliance, designing domain objects, checking for scattered logic in utils/helpers/services, or when user mentions object-oriented data, domain modeling, or translation boundaries.

skills.name: cal-analyze
skills.description: Deep investigation with 7 analysis modes (inside-out, cake-walk, rubberneck, burst, bisect, trace, diff-audit)

skills.name: cal-meet
skills.description: Virtual meeting coordinator - collaborative thinking with AI agents

skills.name: cal-next
skills.description: Advance the pipeline - find and execute next step

skills.name: cal-onboard
skills.description: Project setup - scan codebase, create Cal structure, generate or improve CLAUDE.md

skills.name: cal-save
skills.description: Context preservation - route learnings to cal.md (permanent) or memories/ (ephemeral)
